structure.unit: Waters of the State, Ports and Harbors

law.catch_line: Local governments outside of Tidewater Virginia may adopt provisions
law.text: Any local government, although not a part of Tidewater Virginia, may employ the criteria developed pursuant to § 62.1-44.15:72 and may incorporate protection of the quality of state waters into their comprehensive plans, zoning ordinances, and subdivision ordinances consistent with the provisions of this article.
